---
name: Charter question
about: Ask whether a change conflicts with the project's Charter.
title: "[charter-question] "
labels: charter-question
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the proposed change or observation.

## Charter articles involved

Which Charter Articles does the change touch? (See [CHARTER.md](../../CHARTER.md).)

- [ ] Article 1 — Territory
- [ ] Article 2 — Communication
- [ ] Article 3 — Witness
- [ ] Article 4 — Boundaries
- [ ] Article 5 — Conductor's limits
- [ ] Article 6 — Operator options
- [ ] Article 7 — Refusal list
- [ ] Article 8 — Amendments (this issue IS an amendment)

## Why this is in question

What behaviour of the current code conflicts with a Charter
Article? Quote the Article if helpful.

## Proposed remedy

What code change or governance change resolves the question?

## Notes

Any additional context. Is this a bug, an aspirational-vs-empirical
gap, or a deliberate design choice?
